title: James.Jar
description: James is a friendly NPC that does no damage at all. (Joke mod)
body:
"James is a friendly NPC that is made to be your friend."
                                                                                                                                        -James.jar

Ignore the top message if you like killing everything. He kills you instantly, his health is 256, and runs faster than any other mob in the game, but if you do somehow manage to kill him, he drops a spawn egg. Use the egg to summon James.jar again. Remember, if you punch one, you are basically dead. Also, multiple James.jars can come in hordes. (Rarely.)

(Note: I stopped working on mods a while ago, just wanted to say thanks for downloading.)
